title: carex atrata f. parviflora
intro: Carex atrata f. parviflora, also known as small-flowered black sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carex atrata f. parviflora include relief from urinary tract infections, fever reduction, and soothing of skin irritations. Carex atrata f. parviflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
